changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.forcedNotice: You must change your password before continuing.

errors.staff_no_taken: A user with this staff number already exists.
errors.account_locked: Account temporarily locked after repeated failed logins. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.login_rate_limited: Too many login attempts from this device. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.password_change_required: You must change your password before continuing.
errors.network_error: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
